text.autoconfig.mob_better_config.title: Mob Better Configuration
text.autoconfig.mob_better_config.option: Give Blaze a custom boss-style name when enabled.
Distance at which the Blaze detects and follows targets.
Multiplier applied to Blaze fireball damage.
Damage dealt by Blaze melee attacks.
How fast the Blaze can attack.
Knockback applied when Blaze hits a target.
Height the Blaze can step over without jumping.
Controls how strongly gravity affects the Blaze.
Makes the Blaze glow when enabled.
Allows the Blaze to break doors.
Defines how aggressively the Blaze breaks doors (0–5).
Number of fireballs per attack burst.
Time required before firing charged attacks.
Reduces falling speed of the Blaze.
Whether Blaze takes damage from water.
Chance to spawn additional Blazes when attacked.
Makes all Blazes spawn as bosses.
Chance for a Blaze to spawn as a boss.
Gives boss Blazes a special custom name.

Controls how frequently Cave Spiders spawn.
Chance to spawn additional Cave Spiders when attacked.
Allows Cave Spider attacks to apply poison.
Enables boss variants of Cave Spiders.
Makes all Cave Spiders spawn as bosses.

Health multiplier for boss Cave Spiders.
Damage multiplier for boss Cave Spiders.
XP multiplier for boss Cave Spiders.
Loot multiplier for boss Cave Spiders.
